checklist.name: Non-secret shared handoff
checklist.description: Recommends App Groups/shared container or shared UserDefaults only for non-secret pending-session state and explicitly rejects passwords, refresh tokens, payment credentials, or credential secrets in shared storage.

checklist.name: Sign in with Apple migration
checklist.description: Uses the shared Sign in with Apple user identifier and full-app `ASAuthorizationAppleIDProvider.getCredentialState(forUserID:)` verification for an authorized credential state.

checklist.name: Keychain direction and availability
checklist.description: States that the full app can access App Clip-created keychain items only on iOS 15.4+ with correct association entitlements and that the App Clip cannot read full-app keychain items.

checklist.name: Ephemeral notification authorization
checklist.description: Names `NSAppClipRequestEphemeralUserNotification` under the App Clip target's `NSAppClip` Info.plist dictionary, notes the up-to-8-hour ephemeral notification window after each launch, and checks for `.ephemeral` authorization before scheduling.

checklist.name: Notification relaunch routing
checklist.description: Explains that tapping a notification relaunches without the original invocation URL and should use APNs `target-content-id` or `UNNotificationContent.targetContentIdentifier` for multi-experience/session routing.

checklist.name: Physical location confirmation
checklist.description: Uses `NSUserActivity.appClipActivationPayload` / `APActivationPayload.confirmAcquired(in:)` with a `CLCircularRegion` radius up to 500 meters and places `NSAppClipRequestLocationConfirmation` under the App Clip target's `NSAppClip` Info.plist dictionary, not the full app, without asking for continuous location.
